results.title: Ukraine's air defense neutralizes 264 Russian drones in overnight attack on Ukraine
results.description: Ukraine's air defense forces neutralized 264 drones launched by Russian forces during an overnight attack that began on the evening of June 3.

results.title: Nawaz Sharif’s GB visit changes political atmosphere, says Azma Bukhari
results.description: LAHORE - Punjab Information and Culture Minister Azma Bokhari on Wednesday said that an extraordinary level of enthusiasm is being witnessed among the people of Gilgit-Baltistan ahead of the upcoming elections, with political activity reaching its peak across the region.

results.title: New South London council leader announces 'immediate pause' on plans to close dementia care centre
results.description: The proposals had received backlash and went on to spark strike action
